laws.title: Public Law 7-42 | Transportation Act of 2022
laws.status_basis: Listed under 'Repealed Laws'. Internally permanent general (creates transit divisions, FTA, TSA); no self-repeal/sunset (contains a repeal of another measure, not itself). Repeal external.

provisions.text_summary: General provisions: short title (declines to endorse), effective date, severability, conflicting-legislation null.
provisions.evidence: â€œreferred to as the â€˜Transportation Act of 2020â€™. No short title is endorsed by Congress.â€
provisions.notes: Source text says 2020; PL titled 2022 â€” likely reused/backdated draft.

provisions.text_summary: Findings/whereas clauses on transportation needs.
provisions.evidence: â€œWHEREAS; Vehicles in this country tend to cause significant delay...â€

provisions.text_summary: Establishes a Bus Rapid Transit Division under DOT.
provisions.evidence: â€œThere shall be a Bus Rapid Transit Division under the Federal Government, specifically the Department of Transportationâ€

provisions.text_summary: Forms the Federal Transit Administration under DOT with a Director and duties.
provisions.evidence: â€œThe Federal Transit Administration is hereby formed under the direction of the Department of Transportationâ€

provisions.text_summary: Establishes the Transportation Security Administration under DOT; air-traffic regulation authority.
provisions.evidence: â€œThe Transportation Security Administration is hereby established under the direction of the Department of Transportationâ€

provisions.text_summary: Regulations; municipal-law prohibition repealing conflicting municipal transit/towing laws pursuant to D.C. Home Rule Act (Pub. L. 12-9); deprivatization; general counsel. Also strikes/repeals 'S 63 Towing Companies Regulation Act.'
provisions.target: prior 'S 63 Towing Companies Regulation Act' (non-USC target)
provisions.exact_change: Repeal S. 63 Towing Companies Regulation Act; repeal conflicting municipal transit/towing laws.
provisions.evidence: â€œS 63 Towing Companies Regulation Act is hereby struck down and repealed.â€; â€œpursuant to the District of Columbia Home Rule Act of 2015, Pub. L. 12-9.â€
provisions.notes: Cites Pub. L. 12-9 (a later-numbered PL) as authority â€” anachronistic cross-reference in source; flag for integrator.

provisions.text_summary: Municipal authority over routes/towing/airspace recommendations.
provisions.evidence: â€œthe Municipal Government shall entertain the authority to establish transportation regulationsâ€

provisions.text_summary: Development suggestions (expressly not law).
provisions.evidence: â€œThis section should not be construed to be the law of the United States, but the unanimous suggestion...â€

current_implementation.detail: Full-text dump + Trello link at t49 (correct subject). Repealed law; dump/Trello must be removed. The internal repeal of 'S 63 Towing Companies Regulation Act' and reliance on Pub. L. 12-9 should be captured in a history note only, not as new section text.

recommended_actions: Remove full-text dump and Trello link from rp-pl007042-codification.
Retain a concise historical note in title 49 (repealed); flag anachronistic cross-reference to Pub. L. 12-9 and the repeal of S. 63 for the integrator.

laws.title: Public Law 7-43 | District of Columbia Reorganization Initiative Act
laws.status_basis: Listed under 'Repealed Laws'. Purely local/District measure amending the D.C. City Charter; no self-repeal/sunset. Repeal external.

provisions.text_summary: Short title, severability, effective date; anti-supersession clause.
provisions.evidence: â€œtitled the â€˜District of Columbia Reorganization Initiative Actâ€™â€

provisions.text_summary: Definitions; references external City Charter via hackmd.io link.
provisions.evidence: â€œThe current City Charter of Washington, District of Columbia shall be as linked: https://hackmd.io/...â€
provisions.notes: External-link dependency; amends a document not in the U.S. Code.

provisions.text_summary: Amends Article I of the D.C. City Charter (Council membership from six to five members; abolishes Section IV of Article I).
provisions.target: D.C. City Charter Art. I (not U.S. Code)
provisions.exact_change: Council reduced to five members (chairman + four); Section IV of Article I abolished.
provisions.evidence: â€œThe Council established shall consist of five members... The chairman and four members shall be elected at largeâ€; â€œSection IV... shall be abolished by its entirety.â€
provisions.notes: Amends the D.C. Charter, not the U.S. Code â€” local, not codifiable in USC.

provisions.text_summary: Amends Article II of the D.C. City Charter (Mayor's designation of acting officers now requires City Council consent).
provisions.exact_change: Add City-Council-consent requirement to Mayor's acting-officer designation.
provisions.evidence: â€œThe Mayor may designate the officer or officers... with the consent of the City Council.â€

provisions.text_summary: Establishes D.C. line of succession for the office of Mayor.
provisions.evidence: â€œThe Line of Succession for the Office of the Mayor of Washington, DC shall be the following...â€

current_implementation.detail: Full-text dump + Trello link at t40. Note correctly recognizes local character ('local, appropriations, individual...'), but retains a full dump. This is a purely local/District Charter amendment â€” not U.S. Code section text â€” and is repealed.

recommended_actions: Remove full-text dump and Trello link from rp-pl007043-codification.
Exclude from permanent Code (local/District Charter amendment, repealed); keep at most a concise historical note.

laws.title: Public Law 7-45 | United States Capitol Police Reorganization Act of 2022
laws.status_basis: Listed under 'Repealed Laws'. Internally reorganizes Capitol Police (repeals parts of a prior 'S. 12'); no self-repeal/sunset of itself. Repeal external. Note PL 9-53 SEC. 5 later authorizes transfer/suspension of Capitol Police authority, and PL 9-60 makes the MPD Chief an ex-officio Capitol Police Board member â€” related but not repealing.

provisions.text_summary: Short title, severability, effective date; anti-supersession clause.
provisions.evidence: â€œtitled the â€˜United States Capitol Police Reorganization Act of 2022â€™â€

provisions.text_summary: Repeals Section II and Section V of 'S. 12 - The Capitol Police Establishment' in their entirety.
provisions.target: prior 'S. 12 - The Capitol Police Establishment' (non-USC target)

provisions.evidence: â€œthe following sections of S. 12 - The Capitol Police Establishment shall be repealed by its entirety: (i) Section II... (ii) Section Vâ€
provisions.notes: Target is another local act, not a numbered USC section; capture as history note.

provisions.text_summary: Establishes new Capitol Police Board (congressional leaders + appointees); board duties (appoint/remove Chief, security oversight).
provisions.exact_change: Establish Capitol Police Board composition and duties.
provisions.evidence: â€œthe following members of Congress shall be apart of the Capitol Police Boardâ€

provisions.text_summary: Limits Capitol Police deployment outside jurisdiction; conditions for deployment.
provisions.evidence: â€œThe United States Capitol Police shall not be deployed outside of its jurisdiction unless the Chief... notifies the Capitol Police Board.â€

current_implementation.detail: Full-text dump + Trello link at t18/s1. Subject (Capitol Police organization) fits better in t2 (Congress) or t40 than t18 (crimes). Repealed law; dump/Trello must be removed.

recommended_actions: Remove full-text dump and Trello link from rp-pl007045-codification.
Move any retained note out of t18 to t2/t40; mark repealed; capture repeal of S. 12 sections as history.
